lifestyle_recommendations: Keep mornings uncluttered; begin with a short prayer and fresh air.
Nurture home energy: one small act of care in your living space daily.
Prefer steady routines over sudden lifestyle swings this week.

verses.devanagari: अनन्याश्चिन्तयन्तो मां ये जनाः पर्युपासते। तेषां नित्याभियुक्तानां योगक्षेमं वहाम्यहम्॥
verses.transliteration: ananyāś cintayanto māṃ ye janāḥ paryupāsate | teṣāṃ nityābhiyuktānāṃ yogakṣemaṃ vahāmy aham ||
verses.meaning: To those who worship Me alone, thinking of no other, to those ever-united in thought, I secure what they lack and preserve what they have.

verses.devanagari: सर्वधर्मान्परित्यज्य मामेकं शरणं व्रज। अहं त्वा सर्वपापेभ्यो मोक्षयिष्यामि मा शुचः॥
verses.transliteration: sarvadharmān parityajya mām ekaṃ śaraṇaṃ vraja | ahaṃ tvā sarvapāpebhyo mokṣayiṣyāmi mā śucaḥ ||
verses.meaning: Abandon all varieties of dharma and simply surrender unto Me alone. I shall deliver you from all sinful reactions — do not fear.

verses.devanagari: विश्वं विष्णुर्वषट्कारो भूतभव्यभवत्प्रभुः। भूतकृद्भूतभृद्भावो भूतात्मा भूतभावनः॥
verses.transliteration: viśvaṃ viṣṇur vaṣaṭkāro bhūtabhavyabhavatprabhuḥ | bhūtakṛd bhūtabhṛd bhāvo bhūtātmā bhūtabhāvanaḥ ||
verses.meaning: He who is the universe, who is all-pervading, the Lord of the past, present and future, the creator and sustainer of all beings.

verses.devanagari: कर्मण्येवाधिकारस्ते मा फलेषु कदाचन। मा कर्मफलहेतुर्भूर्मा ते सङ्गोऽस्त्वकर्मणि॥
verses.transliteration: karmaṇy evādhikāras te mā phaleṣu kadācana | mā karmaphalaheturbhūr mā te saṅgo'stvakarmaṇi ||
verses.meaning: You have a right to perform your prescribed duty, but you are not entitled to the fruits of action. Never consider yourself the cause of the results, and never be attached to inaction.

verses.devanagari: यदा यदा हि धर्मस्य ग्लानिर्भवति भारत। अभ्युत्थानमधर्मस्य तदात्मानं सृजाम्यहम्॥
verses.transliteration: yadā yadā hi dharmasya glānir bhavati bhārata | abhyutthānam adharmasya tadātmānaṃ sṛjāmy aham ||
verses.meaning: Whenever there is a decline in righteousness and an increase in unrighteousness, O Arjuna, at that time I manifest Myself.
